title: Marketplace Manager - MyGlamm Global Group - Attractive Package

jsonLd.title: Marketplace Manager - MyGlamm Global Group - Attractive Package
jsonLd.description:
MyGlamm Global Group invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Marketplace Manager at our Raipur location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About MyGlamm Global Group:
MyGlamm Global Group is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery
• Track key performance indicators including GMV, conversion rate, and ROI
• Manage marketplace relationships with Amazon, Flipkart, and Meesho
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs
• Manage email marketing campaigns and push notifications
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in SEO/SEM
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in WooCommerce
• Proficiency in A/B Testing
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Customer Segmentation

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Raipur, Chhattisgarh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with MyGlamm Global Group!
